{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201654141778ECBEA914697150C3"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7367375585725252377","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文字精炼，文学底蕴深厚，故事贴近实务，是一部财务人的成长史，但涉及的不仅仅是财务知识，更有采购管理、法律等专业知识，有上下级间的相处之道，引人入胜，意犹未尽。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715352388,"group_id":"7365143199624465432","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzg3AfE86cRoJFdkJNEx4dmakwa8bOa0wQkquZzIT2B+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2153272404090732","user_name":"用户0123454321"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2153272404090732","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365143199624465432","book_info":{"abstract":"来，看这本书，可以滴血认亲，但是不要对号入座。
一个人在外工作，孤独常来作伴。夜深人静，拧亮书桌台灯，许多记忆中的人和事纷至沓来。零星、散乱、隐约的回忆，在轻轻敲击键盘的声响中相互串联，唤醒和连结了更多的见闻，形成了故事。
财务经理真正要管理的，不是资金，不是账目，不是规矩，而是利益和欲望，其实，经济管理类的职业大都如此。有人众望所归、舍我其谁，有人少年得志、意气风发，有人拉帮结派、暗送秋波，正在职业发展关键时刻的那些人，他们真正感受得到，认识得清吗？各种力量推动他们去竞争，他们用什么去争，如何去争？在竞争中迷失自我，误导他人了吗？
三年时间，书中主角先后经历了成功和失败的人生大戏。朋友成了对手，同事化为路人，英雄末路，劳燕分飞，工作和生活交织的奋斗、计谋和悲喜，让人扼腕唏嘘。
此书为全国一千二百万财务人员和六十五万审计人员而作，更为所有的职场人士而作。阅读此作品，看见和反思真实的职场 、真实的生活、真实的人生。。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o446726f0440d658153df1e320644abd9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"倚杖柴门外","author_id":"","book_id":"7365143199624465432","book_name":"财务经理","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7365143204292723224","read_count":"54","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"502887"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"125","tags":"都市日常,都市,职场","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o446726f0440d658153df1e320644abd9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180854&x-signature=20Knhrkwo6frE1LVWo2jAnNyvps%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1994936252644266","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201654141778ECBEA914697150C3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2857,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":444},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1717083255,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374765341001827097","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"职场 上的波诡云谲，没有丰富的经历写不出来。企业中层这一群体困境和突围，生存和毁灭的悬念。继续追更中。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717073223,"group_id":"7365143199624465432","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Z0woeeQn2x1JVAyVt0BtYwju0OajMMpTZA6mqRBciH","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1273662589385003","user_name":"用户12736625"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1273662589385003","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365143199624465432","book_info":{"abstract":"来，看这本书，可以滴血认亲，但是不要对号入座。

未完，就不知道宁不宁静[捂脸][捂脸]
